title: Notice to property owners
doc_html:
§390. Notice to property owners

            Upon receipt of the deposit, certified copies of the petition, the order, and the receipt for the deposit shall be served upon each property owner.

            Acts 2024, No. 717, §1, eff. June 19, 2024.
doc_text:
§390.  Notice to property owners
Upon receipt of the deposit, certified copies of the petition, the order, and the receipt
for the deposit shall be served upon each property owner.
Acts 2024, No. 717, §1, eff. June 19, 2024.
